debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)),
    ¬e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → ¬(Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e = Exp.c (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args))

  intros w args e h_not_lt h_and

  rcases args with ⟨l, hl⟩
  simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl, assert_bits, Vector.all, Array.all, List.all_eq_true, beq_iff_eq] at h_bits
  have h (acc : ZMod p) (n : ℕ) : acc.val < 2^n → (∀ x ∈ l, x = 0 ∨ x = 1) → (l.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) acc).val < 2^(n + l.length) := by
    induction l generalizing acc n with
    | nil => simp
    | cons b t ih =>
      intro ha hb
      simp at hb
      have hb01 : b.val ≤ 1 := by rcases hb.1 with rfl | rfl <;> simp [ZMod.val_zero, ZMod.val_one]
      have h_sum : b.val + 2 * acc.val < 2^(n + 1) := by
        cases n with
        | zero =>
          have : acc.val = 0 := Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero (Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt ha)
          simp [this, hb01]; exact Nat.lt_succ_of_le hb01
        | succ n =>
          calc b.val + 2 * acc.val
            _ ≤ 1 + 2 * (2^(n+1) - 1) := Nat.add_le_add hb01 (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt ha))
            _ = 2^(n+2) - 1 := by rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.add_sub_assoc (Nat.one_le_pow (n+1) 2 (by simp))]; simp [Nat.pow_succ]
            _ < 2^(n+2) := Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pow_pos (by simp)) (by simp)
      have h_next : (b + 2 * acc).val < 2^(n + 1) := by
        rw [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_mul, ZMod.val_two]
        exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.mod_le _ p) h_sum
      specialize ih (b + 2 * acc) (n + 1) h_next hb.2
      rw [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm 1]; exact ih
  simp [hl]; exact h 0 0 (by simp) h_bits

  intro w args e h ⟨hb, he⟩

  | succ w ih =>
    let b := args.last; let bs := args.pop

    rw [h_push] at hb ⊢

    rw [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_mul]

    apply (Nat.mod_le _ _).trans
    have h_b : b.val ≤ 1 := by rcases hb.2 with rfl | rfl <;> simp [ZMod.val, Nat.Prime.two_le (Fact.out)]
    have h_bs : (bits2num bs).val + 1 ≤ 2 ^ w := ih bs hb.1
    calc b.val + (2 : ZMod p).val * (bits2num bs).val
      _ ≤ 1 + 2 * (bits2num bs).val := Nat.add_le_add h_b (Nat.mul_le_mul_right _ (Nat.mod_le 2 p))
      _ < 2 + 2 * (bits2num bs).val := Nat.lt_succ_self _
      _ = 2 * ((bits2num bs).val + 1) := by rw [Nat.mul_add, Nat.mul_one, Nat.add_comm]
      _ ≤ 2 * 2 ^ w := Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 h_bs
      _ = 2 ^ (w + 1) := by rw [Nat.pow_succ]

      _ ≤ 2 * 2 ^ w := Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.succ_le_of_lt ih)
      _ = 2 ^ (w + 1) := by rw [Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm]

simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl, ZMod.val_zero, Exp.eval]; exact Nat.zero_lt_one
  | succ w ih =>
    obtain ⟨as, v, rfl⟩ := Vector.exists_push args
    simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl_push, assert_bits, Vector.all_push, Exp.eval] at hb ⊢
    have hv : v.val < 2 := by rcases hb.2 with h' | h' <;> simp [h', ZMod.val_zero, ZMod.val_one]
    apply (Nat.mod_le _ p).trans_lt
    have hm : (2 * bits2num as).val ≤ 2 * (bits2num as).val := (Nat.mod_le _ _).trans (Nat.mul_le_mul_right _ (Nat.mod_le 2 _))
    linarith [ih as hb.1] ))

by
  intros w args e h; contrapose! h; rcases h with ⟨hb, rfl⟩; simp [Exp.eval]
  induction w generalizing args with
  | zero => have : args = #v[] := by ext i; exact i.elim0; simp [this, bits2num, Vector.foldl, ZMod.val]
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_dec : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by ext i h; match i with | 0 => rfl | i+1 => rfl
    rw [h_dec] at hb ⊢; unfold bits2num Vector.foldl
    simp only [Vector.toArray_insertIdx, Vector.toArray_tail, Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
    have h_b : args.head.val ≤ 1 := by
      have h := (Vector.all_eq_true.1 hb) 0 (by simp); simp at h; rcases h with h0 | h1 <;> simp [h0, h1]
    have h_ih := ih args.tail (by apply Vector.all_eq_true.2; intro i hi; apply Vector.all_eq_true.1 hb (i+1) (by simp [hi]))
    apply (ZMod.val_add _ _ ▸ Nat.mod_le _ p).trans_lt
    apply (Nat.add_le_add h_b (ZMod.val_mul _ _ ▸ Nat.mod_le _ p)).trans_lt
    apply (Nat.add_le_add h_b (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_of_lt_succ h_ih))).trans_lt
    cases w <;> simp [Nat.mul_sub, Nat.mul_two, Nat.pow_succ, Nat.add_sub_assoc, Nat.one_le_pow]
sorry

by
  intro w args e; contrapose; exact bits_good w args e

by
  intros w args e h_val h_and
  rcases h_and with ⟨h_bits, rfl⟩
  simp [Exp.eval] at h_val
  have h_lt : ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (acc : ZMod p),
    assert_bits args → (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) acc args).val < 2^w * (acc.val + 1) := by
    induction w with
    | zero => intros; simp [Vector.eq_nil args, Vector.foldl, Nat.lt_succ_self]
    | succ n ih =>
      intros acc h; rcases Vector.exists_eq_cons args with ⟨b, tail, rfl⟩
      simp [Vector.foldl, assert_bits, Vector.all] at h
      specialize ih tail (b + 2 * acc) h.2
      apply ih.trans_le; simp [Nat.pow_succ, mul_assoc]
      apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
      have h_b : b.val ≤ 1 := by rcases h.1 with h'|h' <;> simp [beq_iff_eq.1 h']
      calc (b + 2 * acc).val ≤ b.val + (2 * acc).val := by rw [ZMod.val_add]; apply Nat.mod_le
        _ ≤ b.val + 2 * acc.val := Nat.add_le_add_left (by rw [ZMod.val_mul, ZMod.val_two]; exact (Nat.mod_le _ _).trans (Nat.mul_le_mul_right _ (Nat.mod_le _ _))) _
        _ ≤ 1 + 2 * acc.val := Nat.add_le_add_right h_b _
        _ < 2 * acc.val + 2 := Nat.lt_succ_self _
        _ = 2 * (acc.val + 1) := by ring
  specialize h_lt w args 0 h_bits; simp at h_lt; exact h_val h_lt

by
  intro w args e h_val ⟨h_bits, h_e⟩
  apply h_val; rw [h_e, Exp.eval]
  induction args using Vector.inductionOn with
  | nil => simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl]; norm_num
  | push args b ih =>
    simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl, assert_bits] at h_bits ⊢
    rw [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_mul, ZMod.val_two, Nat.pow_succ]
    apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.mod_le _ _)
    have h_b : b.val < 2 := by
      simp [beq_iff_eq] at h_bits; rcases h_bits.2 with rfl | rfl <;> (simp; norm_num)
    specialize ih h_bits.1; omega

by
  intros w args e h ⟨hb, he⟩
  rw [he, Exp.eval] at h
  apply h
  induction w generalizing args with
  | zero => rw [Vector.eq_nil args]; simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl]
  | succ w ih =>
    rcases Vector.exists_rev args with ⟨bs, b, rfl⟩
    simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl, assert_bits] at hb ⊢
    have hb_val : b.val ≤ 1 := by rcases hb.2 with h0 | h1 <;> simp [h0, h1]
    rw [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_mul, ZMod.val_two]
    apply (Nat.le_trans (Nat.mod_le _ _) (Nat.add_le_add_left (Nat.mod_le _ _) _)).trans_lt
    rw [Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_two]
    exact Nat.add_lt_add_of_le_of_lt hb_val (Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left (ih _ hb.1) (Nat.succ_pos 1))

by
  contrapose!; rintro ⟨hb, rfl⟩; simp [bits2num]
  simp [assert_bits, Vector.all_eq_true, beq_iff_eq] at hb
  generalize a0 : (0 : ZMod p) = a; induction w generalizing a hb with
  | zero => simp [Vector.eq_nil args, Vector.foldl]
  | succ w ih =>
    obtain ⟨b, bs, rfl⟩ := args.exists_eq_cons
    apply (ih (λ i => hb i.succ) (b + 2 * a)).trans_le
    rw [Nat.pow_succ, mul_assoc]; apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
    rcases hb 0 with rfl | rfl <;> (simp [ZMod.val_zero, ZMod.val_one, Nat.succ_mul]
    exact (Nat.mod_le _ _).trans (Nat.add_le_add_left (Nat.mod_le _ _) _))

by
  intro w args e h; contrapose! h; rcases h with ⟨hb, rfl⟩; simp [Exp.eval]
  induction w generalizing args with
  | zero => simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl]
  | succ w ih =>
    rw [bits2num, Vector.foldl, ←Vector.cons_head_tail args]
    simp [assert_bits, Vector.all_cons, Array.foldl_cons] at hb ⊢
    apply (Nat.mod_le _ p).trans_lt
    have h_bits : ∀ {w} (v : Vector (ZMod p) w), assert_bits v → ∀ {a n}, a < 2^n → v.toArray.foldl (fun acc b => b.val + 2 * acc) a < 2^(n+w) := by
      intro w v; induction w with
      | zero => intros; simp [*]
      | succ w ih =>
        intros a n hb ha; rw [←Vector.cons_head_tail v, Array.foldl_cons]
        simp [assert_bits, Vector.all_cons] at hb; apply ih hb.2
        rcases hb.1 with h|h <;> simp [h] at * <;> linarith
    exact h_bits args.tail hb.2 (by rcases hb.1 with h|h <;> simp [h] at * <;> norm_num)
